title: LearningEntry
description: A single entry in the learning store (project or global tier). Written by learning_write, updated by learning_verify, promoted by conventions_write_promoted.

pattern.description: Error signature or code pattern this entry addresses.

fix.description: The corrective action that resolved the pattern.

tier.description: Store tier where this entry lives.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the entry was first written.

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent hit.

hits.description: Total number of times this pattern was encountered.

success_count.description: Number of times the fix succeeded (updated by learning_verify).

failure_count.description: Number of times the fix failed (updated by learning_verify).

archived.description: True when the entry has been pruned, expired, or manually archived.

promotion_candidate.description: True when confidence >= 0.8 AND hits >= 3 — eligible for conventions_write_promoted.

promoted_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by conventions_write_promoted when the entry was written to AGENTS.md.

archived_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by learning_archive when the entry was manually archived.
